cards.title: Contxt architecture — two-tier model
cards.summary: Contxt is a portable, privacy-first context layer. Two tiers: PRIVATE (crown jewels, on-device Gemma, E2E encrypted, cloud is a blind relay) and SHARED (cloud Gemma, cloud-readable by any AI). The Crown-Jewels Gateway routes each item and is the trust boundary.
cards.body: Pipeline: Ingest (Gmail + Calendar + Notion) -> Gateway -> Distill -> Store -> Serve over MCP -> any AI.

cards.title: Standup with Theerth — Contxt build
cards.summary: Daily 10:00 IST standup with Theerth K.R. to sync on the Contxt hackathon build ahead of the 2026-07-11 deadline.
